/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Proiect.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/Proiect.dir/src/calculator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Proiect.dir/src/comenzi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Proiect.dir/src/date_fisier.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Proiect.dir/src/director.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Proiect.dir/src/file.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Proiect.dir/src/grupa.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Proiect.dir/src/proiect.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Proiect.dir/src/utilizator.cpp.o -o Proiect
